description_long: This is a sleek, round-topped stool with a single, slender pedestal base. The top is circular and appears to be made of light-colored wood with a subtle grain pattern. The pedestal is gently tapered, transitioning from a darker central section to a lighter base and top, giving it a modern, elegant look. The base is a wide, flat disc, providing stability and echoing the round shape of the seat. There are no visible backrests, footrests, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for urban public spaces such as cafes, parks, or waiting areas.
description: A minimalist, round wooden stool with a single tapered pedestal and a wide, flat base. The design is sleek and modern, with light wood tones and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, slender pedestal, and wide circular base.
description_view_1: Side view with the same features visible, highlighting the smooth taper of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, emphasizing the symmetry of the stool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the continuous, unbroken lines of the pedestal and base.
